[PUBLISHED DATE]: 2024-07-06
[TITLE]: Rescued Fawns Can't Stop Kissing Their Unlikely New Best Friend - The Dodo
[METADATA/INTRO]: Rescued Fawns Can't Stop Kissing Their Unlikely New Best Friend "She loves it."...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: Rescued Fawns Can't Stop Kissing Their Unlikely New Best Friend 
 Everyone knows that cats like to groom each other and that deer love licking salt. A deer licking a cat, though? That’s something you don’t see very often. But just the other day, Carrie Long, a licensed wildlife rehabilitator who owns and runs the rescue Texas Fawn and Friends, caught some of her deer doing just that. 
 One of Long’s friends recently gave her a calico cat whom Long aptly named Callie. Callie, unfortunately, didn’t get along well with Long’s other cats. So she took to spending a lot of time in what Long calls her “fawn room,” where her fawns like to spend a lot of their time.

[TITLE]: Cats and Their Horse and Deer Friends - Love Meow
[METADATA/INTRO]: Animals often amaze us with the love they share with each other. We have covered so many stories about friendships shared between cats and many other different species - squirrels, dogs, mice, deers, and even a giant gorilla. Love really...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: Animals often amaze us with the love they share with each other. We have covered so many stories about friendships shared between cats and many other different species - squirrels, dogs, mice, deers, and even a giant gorilla. Love really doesn't have any boundaries. Perhaps we can learn something from these animals. 
 Photos courtesy of Leesa, an unbelievably talented photographer from Northwest Montana. You can see more photos by her from her website or flickr. 
 Scroll down to see more photos.

[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: Adorable Baby Deer and Kitten Duo Are Destined For Disney Movie Fame [VIDEO] 
 Take a moment and enjoy this video of an adorable kitten named Boots nuzzling into a fawn named Faline. It's so sweet it's guaranteed to give you cavities. 
 This animal pair is darling enough by themselves. But once the baby deer starts to groom the kitten, heads will likely explode from an overload of cuteness. 
 Check it out below. Then head over to our post featuring nine other adorably mismatched animals pairs. Deers are so good at making friends.
